name: Joe Bob Saves Christmas
overview: This Christmas, Joe Bob stuffs your stocking with two bloody tales of Killer Santas run amok. He also saves you from the REAL holiday killer: bad last-minute gifts! Together with Darcy the Mail Girl, he’s auctioning off his own belongings for charity to give you one last shot at not ruining your holiday.
